evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Build governed data products with clear schemas, quality tests, lineage, and ownership; Establish and maintain semantic definitions and certified metrics; Understanding of lineage, data contracts, canonical entities, quality testing
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: multiple governance signals (data contracts, lineage, quality testing, certification, ownership) dominate the JD with no speed language.
evidence.domain_risk: reliable, governed datasets; supporting analytics and AI features used by thousands of retailers
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: errors affect business analytics without regulatory/financial reporting consequence; public-facing impact is indirect.
evidence.data_team_maturity: shared product assets; certified metrics; semantic layer; embedded BI capabilities
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mature: established data function with product-focused delivery, certified metrics, semantic layers, and multiple product feature integration signals maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Build governed data products with clear schemas, quality tests, lineage, and ownership; Write SQL to model, transform, and validate structured data; Establish and maintain semantic definitions and certified metrics
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific tools (dbt, SQL, semantic layers, data contracts) with clear technical application context show domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: data products; certified metrics; semantic layer; analytics features; embedded BI
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role focuses on data infrastructure and platform capabilities for analytics consumers, not commercial/product/finance.
evidence.autonomy_level: Collaborate with domain teams; Support embedded BI; Create documentation and standards
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: candidate delivers scoped data products and supports teams within defined responsibilities, not setting direction.
evidence.ai_role: Support embedded BI and future AI-powered analytics capabilities; creating reliable, governed datasets
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI enabler: candidate builds data infrastructure (semantic layers, governed data products) that downstream AI systems and analytics will consume.
evidence.testing_framing: quality tests; data contracts; canonical entities; quality testing; ensure analytics reliability
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data quality and testing framed as core ownership responsibility, not just tool familiarity.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: governed data products; certified metrics; quality tests; lineage; ensure analytics reliability
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: governance, certification, quality, and reliability language throughout signals strong risk/trust framing in data platform role.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build governed data products; Establish and maintain semantic definitions and certified metrics; Collaborate with domain teams to enhance data quality
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: improving and extending existing analytics infrastructure with governance enhancements, not building from zero.
evidence.loss_aversion: Build governed data products with clear schemas, quality tests, lineage, and ownership; certified metrics as shared product assets.
